provenance.author: mozzarellaARC
provenance.notes: Extracted from Tropical Plants Pack M02P (SM_MZRa_Palm_B082 variant; the cleanest of three palm duplicates). Subtree pruned to its own meshes/materials, world transform baked, normalized to ground-center pivot (+Y up, -Z fwd, meters). 4 textures webp-compressed. Credit in THIRD-PARTY-ASSETS.md.

lod.label: mesh-near+billboard-far
lod.rationale: A ~7m fan palm reads as a distinct fronded silhouette up close, so the near band is the real mesh. Past ~120m the fronds collapse to a flat profile, so the far band is a planned multi-view billboard atlas (not a ground card — it has real vertical height a canopy plant should keep). Atlas not yet baked.

bands.notes: Bake a lat-lon billboard atlas (e.g. 4x2) from the normalized fan-palm mesh for distant scatter.
